name: Dome Energy AB (publ)
summary: Dome Energy AB (publ) operates as an independent oil and gas company. It produces oil, gas, and condensate in Arkansas, Indiana, Kentucky, Louisiana, Michigan, Mississippi, Oklahoma, Texas, and Wyoming. The company was formerly known as Commodity Quest AB (publ). Dome Energy AB (publ) was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Houston, Texas.
